name: openclaw-trust
description: Apply OpenClaw's MITRE ATLAS-mapped threat model to evaluate prompt injection, malicious skills, token theft, tool over-permission, and safe rollout of risky automations.

interface.shortDescription: Apply OpenClaw's MITRE ATLAS-mapped threat model to evaluate prompt injection, malicious skills, token theft, tool over-permission, and safe rollout of risky automations.
interface.longDescription: Prioritize the highest-risk classes first, translate the trust model into concrete controls, and gate risky automations behind approvals before rollout.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use OpenClaw Trust safely.
